title: Don't dissapear on me
description: Adjust till how far Block-Entities will render on mc 1.14 and 1.15
body:
# **Don't disappear on me (1.14.4 & 1.15.2)** Adjust till how far Block Entities will render (Minecraft default = 64 blocks) By default this mod doubles the render distance to 128, though this can be set to whatever you like Use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or the config file to adjust the settings If ``Lock to View Distance`` is enabled, it'll override ``Block-Entity Render Distance`` For minecraft 1.16+ I recommend: [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) **Affected blocks:** - Chests - Trapped Chests - Ender Chests - Shulker Boxes - Signs - Banners - Heads and Skulls - Beds - Conduits - End Portals - Bells - Book of the Enchanting Table - Book on a Lectern - Food on a Campfire - Mob inside a Spawner - Piston animation
Dependencies **Required:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (0.14.0 or later) **Optional:** [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (This mod allows you to edit the config in game) **Already included/embedded:** [Auto Config Updated API](https://github.com/shedaniel/AutoConfig) (Is needed to make the config work) [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required for Auto Config)
